title: Streaming Events, Accessible Status, Cancellation, Reconnect, and Rendering · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A disability-services casework team and the people it supports. They need tenant-isolated context and memory, visible provenance, bounded retries, typed streaming progress, keyboard pause and cancel, restrained announcements, reconnect safety, and human escalation for uncertain or sensitive cases. Planned artifact: Deliver Accessible Streaming Casework Assistant with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
objectives: Label each context item by source, authority, tenant, purpose, timestamp, sensitivity, trust, instruction status, and expiry.
Enforce tenant and user isolation at storage, index, query, cache, logs, deletion, export, backup, and restore boundaries.
Use operation keys, effect receipts, status reconciliation, deduplication windows, and atomic state to prevent duplicate writes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Project Context Source Contract
steps.instruction:
project case — A project agent engineering team handles case 1464 during a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow. Build deterministic Python evidence to render typed streaming events with deterministic assembly, restrained announcements, keyboard cancellation, reconnect identity, and no color-only state; every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy; then change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Stream Reconnect Dedup
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-stream-reconnect-dedup-2p5ozw" that uses case 9772 to render typed streaming events with deterministic assembly, restrained announcements, keyboard cancellation, reconnect identity, and no color-only state. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-stream-reconnect-dedup-2p5ozw
# Competency: agentpy-stream-reconnect-dedup.
# Case 9772: an accessible public-service intake assistant.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects.
def evidence_agentpy_stream_reconnect_dedup_2p5ozw(events: int = 80, assembled_events: int = 80, announced_milestones: int = 8, cancellable_states: int = 5, duplicate_events: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_2p5ozw = "2p5ozw-wzo5p2-9772"
    assert evidence_variant_2p5ozw
    evidence_axes_2p5ozw = (
        "authority2p5ozw",
        "interaction9772",
        "toolwzo5p2",
        "state2p5ozw9772",
        "evaluation97722p5ozw",
        "recoverywzo5p29772",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_2p5ozw)) == 6
    if events < 1 or assembled_events < 0:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-event-count"
    if assembled_events != events:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-assembly"
    if announced_milestones < 4 or cancellable_states < 2:
        return False, announced_milestones, "accessible-stream-control"
    if duplicate_events > 0:
        return False, duplicate_events, "stream-duplication"
    assert assembled_events == events and duplicate_events == 0
    return True, assembled_events, "accessible-agent-event-stream"
